tweets:
AI doesn't just check star ratings.

It reads individual reviews.

What AI wants:
• Detailed patient experiences
• Specific procedure outcomes
• Before/after (with consent)
• Verified reviews

Quantity means nothing.
Authenticity means everything.

Encourage detailed reviews.
Train staff to ask.

→ Want a review optimization plan?
Reply 'REVIEWS' 👇
